title: ratonia litoralis
intro: Ratonia litoralis, also known as the coastal Ratonia, is a plant species native to the coastal regions of South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, derived from its bioactive compounds such as phenolic acids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Ratonia litoralis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antiviral agent. Ratonia litoralis is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and sometimes used in combination with other plants to enhance its medicinal effects.
